THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STROUD, JAMIE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, SPENCER J. $1,230.65 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,280.65, PLAINTIFF MAY NEGOTIATE THE CHECK PREVIOUSLY TENDERED AS PARTIAL RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF THE CHECK IS HONORED AND PLAINTIFF RECEIVES THOSE FUNDS, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THE PARTIAL PAYMENT.
